title: Rollback GeoMakie to 0.7.12 and add upper compat bound

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Closes #1227 

`:sfc_S_e` was removed from the cache in [this PR](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaLand.jl/pull/1184/files#diff-5716d5da0fdc9fa791a47f713ab05d5828c85b70ea0d803b3888dacce32cf7e7L797). In this PR, it was removed from the `boundary_var_types` method for `AtmosDrivenFluxBC` , but not from the method for `AtmosDrivenFluxBC{<:CoupledAtmosphere, <:CoupledRadiativeFluxes}`. This causes coupled runs using the land model to fail since the boundary variables and types are mismatched as the cache is constructed.

See ClimaCoupler failures [here](https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-ci/builds/6807).

Also includes a patch release to tag the bugfix.
title: fix soil boundary var construction with coupled atmos
